plan_summary.plan_name: Hauts-de-France 9 GW Sovereign AI Engine — Pragmatic Scale-Up
plan_summary.primary_goal: Complete Phase 1 (1 GW operational, PUE <=1.20) within 36 months while securing the 60% take-or-pay anchor commitment and binding RTE 3 GW transmission contract required for Phase 2 FID.
plan_summary.modelling_frame: Tests Phase 1 viability gates: budget coverage of CAPEX plus land-holding overrun, anchor take-or-pay commitment margin against the 60% threshold, FX exposure absorption on USD-hardware, and PUE clearance margin. Existential gates (binding RTE 3 GW allocation, DGSI/ANSSI sign-off, judicial buffer authorization) are flagged but not financially tested.

key_values.label: Phase 1 CAPEX budget (1 GW)
key_values.comment: Phase 1 capital outlay for 500 MW-1 GW buildout; mid-point of stated 5-10B range.
key_values.source_text: Estimated Phase 1 budget for 500 MW-1 GW: 5B-10B initial CapEx estimate.

key_values.label: Phase 2 take-or-pay commitment threshold
key_values.comment: 60% take-or-pay for next 2 GW tranche must be signed before Phase 2 expansion FID; primary financial gate.
key_values.source_text: Minimum take-or-pay commitment threshold for 1-3 GW expansion: 60% financial gate for next tranche funding.

key_values.label: Non-buildable buffer area
key_values.comment: 128.8 km^2 buffer (80% of 161 km^2) requires holding-cost budgeting; uncosted in plan, drives early-CAPEX overrun risk.

key_values.label: Land-holding duration (Phase 1)
key_values.comment: Plan explicitly budgets 18 months upfront for buffer holding, ring-fenced from infrastructure CAPEX.
key_values.source_text: Explicitly budget holding costs for the 128.8 km^2 buffer for 18 months upfront.

key_values.label: USD-hardware share of total CAPEX
key_values.comment: Plan assumes 30% of the 120B buildout is USD-denominated hardware; drives FX risk model.
key_values.source_text: 30% of 120B CAPEX is USD-denominated hardware; 70% hedged.

key_values.label: USD hardware FX hedge coverage
key_values.comment: 70% of USD hardware procurement is hedged via forwards; remaining 30% is unhedged exposure.
key_values.source_text: Implement multi-year forward hedging for 70% of USD hardware needs (Phase 1 and 2).

key_values.label: Unfavourable EUR/USD shift magnitude
key_values.comment: Plan stress-tests a 10% unfavourable EUR depreciation against USD as the FX shock scenario.
key_values.source_text: If EUR depreciates >10% vs. USD, hardware costs could inflate by 8B-15B.

key_values.label: Phase 1 contingency reserve (inferred 15%)
key_values.comment: Inferred 15% contingency on Phase 1 CAPEX; absorbs land-holding overrun, FX residual, and remediation shocks.
key_values.source_text: Phase 0 must include funding for uncosted land holding reserves; budget overrun (1.3B+) risk.

derived_questions.question: Does Phase 1 CAPEX budget translate into a stable USD-equivalent envelope after FX shock absorption?
derived_questions.why_it_matters: Hardware procurement is USD-denominated; quantifying residual exposure makes the FX gate test interpretable.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Annual holding cost per hectare of buffer land
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Plan flags 128.8 km^2 buffer holding cost as uncosted; needed to budget the 18-month holding overrun.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Benchmark local cadastral rates and agricultural easement charges in Hauts-de-France (Dunkirk/Cambrai); Review Issue 2 cites 50k-75k EUR/ha/year.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Realised take-or-pay commitment fraction at Phase 2 FID
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: The 60% threshold is a hard gate; modelling needs the realised commitment to compute the gate margin.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Anchor base at the 0.6 plan commitment; spread reflects anchor-tenant retraction risk flagged in Premortem and Risk 3.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Realised Phase 1 operational PUE
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Plan caps PUE at 1.20; tenant SLA compliance gates depend on the realised value; needed for PUE-margin gate.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Anchor on plan target 1.20; spread reflects Risk 2 (0.1 PUE drift on liquid cooling brownfield scale-up).

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Brownfield remediation overrun above baseline
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Risk 9 forecasts 250-750M baseline doubling/tripling to 500M-2.25B; consumes the contingency reserve.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Use the cited overrun range as a one-sided draw; base at the mid-point of the doubling scenario.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Total 18-month buffer-land holding cost
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Quantifies the uncosted holding burden flagged in Review Issue 2 as a 1.3B early-CAPEX overrun risk.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Unhedged FX exposure on Phase 1 USD hardware
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Quantifies residual EUR exposure from the unhedged 30% of USD hardware under a 10% depreciation shock (Risk 4).

recommended_first_calculations.label: Phase 2 take-or-pay commitment margin
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Tests the 60% take-or-pay financial gate; positive margin clears Phase 2 FID.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Phase 1 PUE clearance margin
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Engineering SLA gate; tenant contract compliance and energy-cost penalties trip if realised PUE exceeds 1.20.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Phase 1 contingency surplus after land-holding, FX, and remediation overruns
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Combined viability test of the 15% reserve against the three named Phase 1 cost overruns the plan attributes to one budget envelope.

unmodelled_gates.label: RTE binding 3 GW transmission allocation
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Phase 1 construction financing is contractually blocked until a binding RTE transmission contract for the 3 GW Phase 2 expansion is in hand; the model treats the gate as a fixed input.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Phase 1 construction financing cannot close; 1B-2B Phase 0/1 capital stranded if tenants withdraw.

unmodelled_gates.label: DGSI/ANSSI sovereign-partition sign-off
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Without a formal DGSI/ANSSI agreement before Phase 1 Power FID, premium sovereign revenue streams (10B-20B long-term) are jeopardised; gate is regulatory, not quantitative.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Premium domestic revenue stream lost; 60% Phase 2 commitment threshold becomes harder to clear.

unmodelled_gates.label: Judicial/permitting authorization for hyper-dense 80% buffer model
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Prefectural/judicial review of the 80% buffer can reduce buildable area below 20 km^2, capping capacity at 3-4 GW; outcome is political, not financial.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Buildable area capped; 9 GW long-term goal abandoned; business case re-evaluated downward.

unmodelled_gates.label: Social license credibility (workforce, heat reuse)
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Plan states it must not proceed past Phase 0 if social license is not credible; outcome depends on community acceptance of workforce mandate and heat reuse commitments.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Phase 0 exit condition fails; project does not progress to Phase 1 FID.
